title: UL Listed Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale UL 48 listed channel letters built for code compliance. German-engineered aluminum, LED illumination, 3-week delivery. Sign trade professionals only.
heroSubtitle: Every channel letter set we manufacture carries a UL 48 listing. Code compliance is built into our process — not an afterthought. Wholesale pricing for sign professionals.

sections.heading: Why UL 48 Listing Matters for Your Sign Projects
sections.content:
Building inspectors, electrical inspectors, and property managers increasingly require UL 48 listed signage for commercial installations. A UL listing confirms that the sign has been designed, manufactured, and tested to meet recognized safety standards for electric signs. Without it, your client's project can face permit delays, failed inspections, and costly rework.

At Sunlite Signs, UL 48 compliance is integral to every channel letter we produce. Our facility undergoes regular unannounced UL audits to verify that materials, wiring methods, and assembly processes meet listed specifications. Every letter set ships with a UL label affixed to the raceway or junction box, giving your installation crew immediate proof of compliance on the job site.

Our German-engineered fabrication process ensures that every component — from aluminum return thickness to LED module spacing to wire gauge selection — meets or exceeds UL requirements. This is not a box we check at the end of production; it is embedded in every step of our manufacturing workflow.

sections.heading: Compliance Documentation & Support
sections.content:
We provide comprehensive documentation with every UL listed channel letter order to streamline your permitting and inspection process:

  • UL 48 Labels: Pre-affixed to the raceway or individual letters, depending on configuration
  • Wiring Diagrams: Complete electrical schematics showing transformer placement, wire runs, and connection points
  • Power Supply Specifications: UL recognized power supplies with output ratings, input requirements, and installation notes
  • Component Data Sheets: LED module specifications, expected lifespan, and operating temperature ranges

Our complimentary engineering support extends to field questions during installation. If an inspector raises a question about the listing, our team can provide clarification, additional documentation, or direct communication with the inspection authority. Standard lead time is 3 weeks from approved artwork, and every order ships with the documentation your crew needs for a smooth inspection.

faqs.question: Are all your channel letters UL 48 listed?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every illuminated channel letter set we manufacture is UL 48 listed. This includes front lit, halo lit, combination lit, and open face configurations. The UL label ships pre-affixed to each letter set.

faqs.question: What documentation do you provide for inspections?
faqs.answer: Each order includes UL 48 labels, complete wiring diagrams, power supply specifications, and LED module data sheets. If an inspector needs additional documentation, our engineering team can provide it within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Can you provide UL listings for retrofit LED conversions?
faqs.answer: UL 48 listings apply to complete sign assemblies manufactured in our facility. Retrofit conversions using field-installed components fall under UL 879 or local electrical code requirements. Contact us to discuss compliant retrofit options.

title: Energy Efficient LED Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale energy efficient LED channel letters that cut power costs up to 60%. UL 48 listed, German-engineered, 3-week lead time. Built for the sign trade.
heroSubtitle: High-output LED modules that deliver brilliant illumination at a fraction of the power consumption. Help your clients reduce operating costs while maintaining maximum visibility.

sections.heading: Lower Operating Costs Without Sacrificing Brightness
sections.content:
Energy costs are a recurring concern for commercial property owners and national brand managers. LED channel letters from Sunlite Signs use high-efficiency LED modules rated at 160+ lumens per watt, delivering the same or better brightness as older-generation modules while consuming significantly less power. A typical storefront letter set draws 40-60% less electricity than fluorescent or first-generation LED alternatives.

Our German-engineered approach optimizes LED placement within each letter to eliminate waste. Rather than over-populating letters with modules, we calculate the precise number and spacing needed for even face illumination. The result is fewer modules per letter, lower total wattage, and reduced heat generation — all without visible dark spots or uneven lighting.

For sign shops bidding on projects where energy consumption is a deciding factor, our power consumption specifications give you a competitive edge. We provide per-letter and total-set wattage calculations with every quote, making it easy to demonstrate long-term savings to property managers and CFOs.

sections.heading: LED Specifications & Longevity
sections.content:
Every channel letter from Sunlite Signs uses LED modules selected specifically for sign applications. Here is what sets our modules apart:

  • 50,000+ Hour Rated Life: At 12 hours per day operation, that is over 11 years before modules reach 70% of initial brightness
  • Wide Operating Temperature: Rated for -40°F to 140°F, suitable for every climate zone in North America
  • IP65 Moisture Protection: Sealed against rain, snow, humidity, and washdown exposure
  • High CRI Options: Available with CRI 80+ for applications where accurate color rendition matters

We back our LED modules with a 5-year warranty covering both brightness degradation and outright failure. Power supplies carry a separate 5-year warranty. All components are UL recognized, and every assembled letter set is UL 48 listed. Standard delivery is 3 weeks from approved artwork, with complimentary engineering support included on every order.

faqs.question: How much energy do LED channel letters save versus fluorescent?
faqs.answer: LED channel letters typically consume 40-60% less power than fluorescent equivalents of the same size and brightness. A 20-letter storefront set that drew 800 watts with fluorescent tubes may draw only 300-400 watts with our high-efficiency LEDs.

faqs.question: Do you provide energy consumption data for permit applications?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every quote includes per-letter wattage, total set wattage, and amperage draw at the specified voltage. We can also provide utility rebate documentation where applicable.

faqs.question: What is the warranty on your LED modules?
faqs.answer: Our LED modules carry a 5-year warranty covering brightness degradation below 70% of initial output and complete module failure. Power supplies are warranted separately for 5 years.

title: Waterproof Outdoor Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale waterproof outdoor channel letters engineered for extreme weather. IP65 LEDs, sealed aluminum housing, UL 48 listed. 3-week delivery for sign shops.
heroSubtitle: Engineered for years of reliable outdoor performance in rain, snow, heat, and coastal salt air. Every component is rated for exterior exposure from day one.

sections.heading: Built to Withstand the Elements
sections.content:
Outdoor channel letters face relentless environmental stress — UV radiation, driving rain, freeze-thaw cycles, salt air, and temperature extremes. Sunlite Signs engineers every letter set to handle these conditions without premature failure or degradation. Our German-engineered aluminum housings use 0.040" minimum aluminum returns with fully welded seams that prevent moisture intrusion at joints and corners.

Internal components receive equal attention. LED modules are IP65 rated, meaning they are sealed against water jets and dust penetration. Wiring connections use marine-grade heat-shrink terminals and silicone-sealed junction points. Power supply housings are NEMA 3R rated for outdoor mounting. Every detail is designed to prevent the moisture-related failures that generate costly service calls for your sign shop.

Acrylic faces are UV-stabilized to resist yellowing and fading over years of sun exposure. We use cast acrylic rather than extruded material for superior dimensional stability and weather resistance. Trim caps — where specified — are bonded and mechanically fastened for a secondary seal against wind-driven rain.

sections.heading: Climate-Specific Engineering
sections.content:
Not all outdoor environments present the same challenges. Sunlite Signs offers climate-specific enhancements based on your installation region:

  • Coastal Installations: Stainless steel mounting hardware, enhanced corrosion-resistant coatings, and marine-grade electrical connections for salt air environments
  • Northern Climates: Extended temperature-range LED drivers, flexible wiring rated to -40°F, and weep holes for condensation management during freeze-thaw cycles
  • Southern/Desert Climates: High-temperature LED modules rated to 150°F, UV-enhanced acrylic, and ventilation provisions to manage heat buildup in dark-colored letters
  • High Wind Zones: Reinforced mounting points, through-bolt fastener patterns, and structural calculations for wind load compliance

Our complimentary engineering service evaluates each project's environmental requirements and recommends the appropriate specifications. Every letter set is UL 48 listed and ships within 3 weeks from approved artwork. We include detailed installation drawings and mounting specifications tailored to your project conditions.

faqs.question: What IP rating do your outdoor channel letters have?
faqs.answer: Our LED modules are IP65 rated, providing complete protection against dust and water jets. The overall letter assembly provides equivalent protection through sealed aluminum construction, bonded trim caps, and marine-grade wiring connections.

faqs.question: How do your letters perform in coastal salt air environments?
faqs.answer: We offer coastal-specification packages that include stainless steel hardware, enhanced anti-corrosion coatings, and marine-grade electrical connections. These modifications significantly extend service life in salt air environments. Let us know the installation location and we will spec accordingly.

faqs.question: Do you provide wind load calculations for outdoor installations?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our complimentary engineering service includes wind load calculations based on your project's geographic location, mounting height, and local building code requirements. We provide stamped engineering drawings where required by the authority having jurisdiction.

title: How Channel Letters Are Made | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Learn how wholesale channel letters are manufactured from aluminum coil to finished sign. German-engineered CNC fabrication, UL 48 listed. Sign trade education.
heroSubtitle: From flat aluminum coil to finished illuminated signage — a detailed look at the German-engineered manufacturing process behind every Sunlite Signs channel letter set.

sections.heading: CNC Fabrication & Assembly Process
sections.content:
Channel letter manufacturing begins with precision CNC routing and bending. At Sunlite Signs, our German-engineered process starts with digital artwork conversion — your vector files are translated into machine-ready cut paths optimized for material yield and structural integrity.

Aluminum backs are CNC-routed from 0.063" sheet stock, creating the exact letter profile. Returns — the side walls that give channel letters their three-dimensional depth — are cut from aluminum coil and formed on CNC channel letter benders. These machines produce smooth, consistent curves that follow the letter contour with tight tolerances, eliminating the waviness and inconsistencies common in hand-bent returns.

Returns are attached to backs using a combination of spot welding and continuous welding at stress points. LED modules are then mounted inside each letter using engineering-specified spacing patterns that ensure even illumination. Wiring is routed, connected, and secured before the acrylic face or trim cap is installed. Every completed letter undergoes a full illumination test and quality inspection before packing.

sections.heading: Quality Control & Finishing
sections.content:
Quality control at Sunlite Signs is not a final checkpoint — it is integrated throughout the manufacturing process:

  • Material Inspection: Incoming aluminum coil, acrylic sheets, and LED modules are verified against specifications before entering production
  • Dimensional Verification: CNC-cut components are measured against digital artwork at multiple checkpoints to ensure letter geometry matches the approved proof
  • Weld Integrity: All welds are visually inspected and tested for structural soundness before finishing
  • Paint & Finish: Letters are cleaned, primed, and painted using automotive-grade coatings that resist fading, chipping, and chalking for years of outdoor exposure
  • Illumination Testing: Every letter is powered on and inspected for even light distribution, correct color temperature, and absence of dark spots or hot spots

This process results in channel letters that meet UL 48 listing requirements and arrive at your shop ready for installation. Our 3-week production timeline includes all quality checkpoints, and our complimentary engineering support is available throughout the process.

faqs.question: What materials are used to make channel letters?
faqs.answer: Standard channel letters use 0.063" aluminum sheet for backs, aluminum coil for returns, translucent acrylic for faces, and high-output LED modules for illumination. Stainless steel, brass, and copper are available for premium applications. All materials are UL recognized.

faqs.question: How long does it take to manufacture a channel letter set?
faqs.answer: Standard production at Sunlite Signs is 3 weeks from approved artwork. This includes CNC fabrication, welding, painting, LED installation, wiring, quality testing, and packing. Rush service is available for qualifying orders.

faqs.question: What is the difference between CNC-bent and hand-bent channel letters?
faqs.answer: CNC-bent returns produce smoother, more consistent curves with tighter tolerances than hand-bending. The result is cleaner letter geometry, especially on curves and small-radius corners. Sunlite Signs uses German-engineered CNC benders exclusively for consistent quality across every order.

title: Channel Letter Installation Guide | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter installation guide covering raceway, flush mount, and backer panel methods. UL 48 listed signs with complimentary engineering support.
heroSubtitle: Comprehensive installation guidance for sign professionals. From raceway mounting to direct flush mount — every Sunlite Signs order ships with detailed templates and specifications.

sections.heading: Mounting Methods & Site Preparation
sections.content:
Proper channel letter installation begins well before your crew arrives on site. Sunlite Signs provides full-scale paper mounting templates with every order, allowing precise hole placement and wire routing before letters are lifted into position. Our templates include centerline marks, mounting hole locations, wire penetration points, and level reference lines.

The three primary mounting methods each suit different building conditions:

Raceway Mounting is the most common method. Letters are pre-wired to an aluminum raceway (rectangular box) in our facility, shipped as a complete assembly, and bolted to the building fascia. This approach minimizes field wiring and speeds installation. Flush Mounting involves attaching individual letters directly to the building surface with threaded studs. Wiring runs behind the wall or through a wireway. This method produces a clean, floating appearance. Backer Panel Mounting uses an aluminum panel as an intermediate surface, allowing installation on uneven surfaces like stone, brick, or split-face block.

Our complimentary engineering team can review your site conditions and recommend the optimal mounting approach for each project.

sections.heading: Electrical Connections & Final Inspection
sections.content:
All electrical connections for channel letter installations must comply with the National Electrical Code and local amendments. Sunlite Signs provides detailed wiring diagrams with every order to support clean, code-compliant installations:

  • Power Supply Placement: Locate remote power supplies in accessible, ventilated locations per NEC requirements. We specify minimum wire gauge and maximum run distances for each configuration
  • Primary Connections: Input wiring from the building electrical panel to the power supply must be performed by a licensed electrician per local code
  • Secondary Wiring: Low-voltage connections from power supply to letters are pre-terminated at our facility. Field connections use waterproof quick-connect fittings included with every order
  • Grounding: All metal components must be properly grounded per NEC Article 600. We include grounding lugs and specifications with every letter set

After installation, perform a complete illumination test before final inspection. Check every letter for even illumination, verify power supply operation, and confirm all connections are secure. Our UL 48 listing documentation ships with every order to facilitate electrical inspection sign-off. Contact our engineering team with any field questions — support is complimentary.

faqs.question: Do you provide installation templates with every order?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every channel letter order ships with a full-scale paper mounting template showing exact letter positions, mounting hole locations, wire penetration points, and level reference lines. Templates are rolled and shipped in a separate tube to prevent damage.

faqs.question: Can your letters be flush-mounted to a brick wall?
faqs.answer: Yes, but we typically recommend a backer panel for masonry installations. The panel provides a flat, consistent mounting surface and simplifies wire routing. Our engineering team will specify the appropriate panel size, thickness, and fastener pattern for your wall type.

faqs.question: What electrical work is required for installation?
faqs.answer: A licensed electrician must run primary power from the building panel to the sign power supply location. Secondary (low-voltage) wiring from the power supply to the letters is pre-terminated at our facility and uses plug-in connections for simple field assembly.

title: Channel Letter Sizing Guide | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter sizing guide for sign professionals. Visibility formulas, height recommendations, and code requirements. Complimentary engineering support.
heroSubtitle: Proper letter sizing ensures visibility, code compliance, and aesthetic balance. Use this guide to specify the right dimensions for every project.

sections.heading: Visibility Distance & Letter Height
sections.content:
The fundamental purpose of channel letters is identification and visibility. The sign industry uses a well-established formula: 1 inch of letter height provides approximately 10 feet of readable distance. A 24-inch letter is readable from roughly 240 feet, while a 12-inch letter is readable from about 120 feet.

However, this formula is a starting point, not a rule. Several factors affect real-world readability:

Viewing Speed: Signs on highways need larger letters than signs on local streets because drivers have less time to read them. For 45+ mph roads, increase letter height by 20-30% over the baseline formula. Mounting Height: Letters mounted above the second story require increased height to compensate for the steeper viewing angle. Font Weight: Thin, light-weight fonts require larger sizes to achieve the same readability as bold, heavy fonts. Background Contrast: Letters on a contrasting background (dark letters on a light wall) are more readable than low-contrast combinations.

Sunlite Signs offers complimentary engineering consultations to help you specify the right letter height for each project's unique conditions.

sections.heading: Letter Depth, Stroke Width & Minimum Sizes
sections.content:
Beyond height, two additional dimensions affect channel letter specifications:

  • Letter Depth (Return Height): Standard depths range from 3" to 5". Deeper returns house LED modules comfortably and produce even illumination. Shallower returns create a sleeker profile but may require higher-density LED placement. We recommend minimum 3.5" depth for most applications
  • Stroke Width: The width of the letter's strokes determines the minimum practical size for illumination. Strokes narrower than 1" cannot accommodate standard LED modules. We recommend minimum 1.5" stroke width for reliable, even illumination
  • Minimum Letter Height: For illuminated channel letters, we recommend 8" minimum height. Non-illuminated channel letters can be fabricated as small as 4" but require careful font selection

Local sign codes often dictate maximum letter height, total sign area, and illumination restrictions. Our complimentary engineering team reviews local code requirements when provided and can adjust specifications accordingly. Every order is UL 48 listed and ships within 3 weeks from approved artwork. We include detailed shop drawings showing all dimensions for your approval before production begins.

faqs.question: What is the recommended letter height for a shopping center?
faqs.answer: Most shopping center tenants use 18" to 24" channel letters, though anchor tenants may go up to 36" or larger. The correct size depends on viewing distance, sign code restrictions, and fascia dimensions. We can review your specific project requirements and recommend appropriate sizing.

faqs.question: What is the minimum size for illuminated channel letters?
faqs.answer: We recommend 8" minimum height for illuminated channel letters and 1.5" minimum stroke width. Below these dimensions, LED modules cannot be spaced effectively for even illumination. For smaller applications, consider non-illuminated flat-cut letters with external lighting.

faqs.question: Do you provide shop drawings before production?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every order includes detailed shop drawings showing letter heights, depths, stroke widths, overall sign dimensions, and mounting specifications. Production does not begin until you approve the drawings. Revisions are included at no additional charge.

title: Channel Letter Color Options | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter color options including 40+ standard acrylics, PMS matching, and custom paint finishes. UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery for sign shops.
heroSubtitle: From standard acrylic colors to exact PMS matches — we offer the full spectrum of face and return color options to match any brand identity specification.

sections.heading: Acrylic Face Colors & Custom Matching
sections.content:
The acrylic face is the most visible color element of a front lit channel letter. Sunlite Signs stocks over 40 standard translucent acrylic colors from leading manufacturers including Plaskolite and Acrylite. These standard colors cover the full spectrum and satisfy the majority of commercial signage projects.

For brand-critical applications requiring exact color reproduction, we offer PMS and RAL color matching. Our process uses custom-cast acrylic formulated to match the specified color under both daylight and illuminated conditions. This dual-condition matching is critical because acrylic colors can shift significantly when backlit by white LEDs. We provide physical color samples for approval before committing to production.

Full-color graphics, gradients, logos, and photographic images are reproduced using digital-print translucent vinyl applied to white acrylic faces. This process delivers photographic-quality reproduction with outdoor durability rated at 5-7 years. It is the preferred method for multi-color brand marks that cannot be reproduced with solid-color acrylic panels.

sections.heading: Return & Trim Cap Finishes
sections.content:
Channel letter returns (side walls) and trim caps are finished to complement the acrylic face and match the overall brand design. Available finishes include:

  • Painted Aluminum: Automotive-grade polyurethane paint in any color. We match PMS, RAL, and custom color specifications. Standard and metallic finishes available
  • Brushed Aluminum: Natural brushed finish with clear protective coating. A popular choice for modern, industrial, and architectural designs
  • Polished Stainless Steel: Mirror-finish stainless for luxury brands and high-end retail. Also available in brushed and satin finishes
  • Anodized Aluminum: Available in black, bronze, champagne, and clear. Offers exceptional durability for exterior applications

Trim cap color — the plastic retainer that holds the acrylic face — is available in black, white, bronze, and clear as standard options. Custom trim cap colors can be sourced for qualifying order quantities. Our team helps you select the optimal combination of face color, return finish, and trim cap color to achieve the design intent. All options are compatible with our UL 48 listed assemblies and ship within our standard 3-week production timeline.

faqs.question: Can you match a specific PMS or Pantone color?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer PMS and RAL color matching for both acrylic faces and painted returns. For acrylic faces, we use custom-cast material matched under both daylight and illuminated conditions. We provide physical samples for approval before production.

faqs.question: How many standard acrylic colors do you stock?
faqs.answer: We stock over 40 standard translucent acrylic colors from Plaskolite and Acrylite. These cover the full color spectrum and are available without the lead time or minimum quantities associated with custom-cast colors.

faqs.question: Can you reproduce full-color logos on channel letter faces?
faqs.answer: Yes. We use digital-print translucent vinyl applied to white acrylic faces to reproduce full-color logos, gradients, and photographic images. This method is rated for 5-7 years of outdoor durability.

title: Channel Letter Font Guide | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter font selection guide for sign pros. Best fonts for fabrication, readability, and illumination. Complimentary engineering support included.
heroSubtitle: Font choice directly impacts fabrication cost, readability, and illumination quality. This guide helps you specify fonts that look great and build efficiently.

sections.heading: Font Characteristics That Affect Fabrication
sections.content:
Not all fonts translate equally well to channel letter fabrication. Understanding how font characteristics affect manufacturing helps you specify letters that meet design goals while staying within budget. Key factors include:

Stroke Width Consistency: Fonts with consistent stroke widths — such as Helvetica, Futura, and Gotham — are ideal for channel letters because LED modules can be spaced evenly throughout each letter. Fonts with extreme thick-to-thin variation (like Bodoni or Didot) create illumination challenges in thin strokes while wasting space in thick areas.

Serif Complexity: Elaborate serifs with fine details, thin brackets, and sharp points increase fabrication time and cost. If a serif font is required, choose designs with robust, slab-style serifs like Rockwell, Clarendon, or Memphis. Avoid delicate serifs that may not survive bending or may be too narrow for LED placement.

Script and decorative fonts can be fabricated but often require minimum height increases to maintain structural integrity on thin connecting strokes. Our German-engineered CNC benders handle complex curves, but physics still governs minimum aluminum bend radius. We review every font submission and flag potential issues before production.

sections.heading: Readability & Illumination Performance
sections.content:
The best channel letter font balances brand identity with real-world readability. Consider these guidelines when specifying fonts for your projects:

  • Sans-Serif Fonts: Generally the best performers for channel letters. Clean geometry, consistent stroke widths, and excellent readability at distance. Top picks: Helvetica, Arial, Futura, Gotham, Montserrat
  • Slab Serif Fonts: Good performers with strong visual presence. Serifs add character without fabrication complications. Top picks: Rockwell, Clarendon, Memphis, Archer
  • Script Fonts: Can produce stunning results but require careful sizing. Connecting strokes must be wide enough for structural integrity and LED placement. Minimum 12" height recommended for most scripts
  • Custom/Logo Fonts: We fabricate any font or custom letterform your client requires. Send us the vector artwork and we will evaluate fabricability and provide recommendations

Our complimentary engineering team reviews every font submission for fabrication suitability and provides recommendations if modifications would improve the result. We want your finished letters to look exactly as your client expects. Standard production is 3 weeks from approved artwork, and shop drawings show exact letter geometry for your approval before we begin fabrication.

faqs.question: What fonts work best for channel letters?
faqs.answer: Sans-serif fonts with consistent stroke widths produce the best results. Helvetica, Futura, Gotham, and Montserrat are top performers. Slab serifs like Rockwell and Clarendon also work well. We can fabricate any font but will recommend modifications if a design presents fabrication or illumination challenges.

faqs.question: Can you fabricate script fonts as channel letters?
faqs.answer: Yes. Script fonts require larger minimum sizes (typically 12"+) to maintain structural integrity on thin connecting strokes. We review every script font submission and provide specific size recommendations to ensure the finished letters meet structural and illumination requirements.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for complex fonts?
faqs.answer: Fonts with extreme detail, very thin strokes, or complex serifs may require additional fabrication time, which can affect pricing. We provide transparent quotes that reflect actual fabrication complexity. Simple font changes during the quoting phase are always free.

title: Reverse Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale reverse channel letters with sophisticated back-glow illumination. German-engineered aluminum, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Sign trade professionals only.
heroSubtitle: Opaque-faced letters that project light backward to create an elegant halo effect against the mounting surface. The premium choice for upscale branding and architectural signage.

sections.heading: Sophisticated Illumination for Premium Brands
sections.content:
Reverse channel letters deliver a refined, understated illumination that sets upscale brands apart. Unlike front lit letters that project light outward through translucent faces, reverse channel letters use opaque metal faces and open or translucent backs to direct LED light against the mounting surface. The result is a soft, diffused halo that outlines each letter with an ambient glow.

This illumination style excels in applications where subtlety and sophistication are paramount — luxury retail, boutique hospitality, medical offices, corporate headquarters, and high-end dining establishments. During daylight hours, the non-illuminated metal faces present a clean, architectural appearance. After dark, the back-glow effect transforms the signage into an elegant focal point.

Sunlite Signs manufactures reverse channel letters using the same German-engineered fabrication process and UL 48 listed assembly standards as our entire channel letter line. The difference is purely in light direction and face material — construction quality, LED longevity, and weather resistance are identical to our front lit products.

sections.heading: Face Materials & Design Specifications
sections.content:
The opaque face of a reverse channel letter is a key design element. Sunlite Signs offers multiple face material options to suit different brand aesthetics:

  • Painted Aluminum: The most versatile option. Available in any PMS, RAL, or custom color with matte, satin, or gloss finish. Automotive-grade polyurethane paint for outdoor durability
  • Brushed Aluminum: A clean, modern look with natural metallic texture. Protected with clear-coat for exterior exposure
  • Stainless Steel: Available in mirror polish, brushed, or satin finishes. The premium choice for luxury brands and architectural applications
  • Patina Metals: Brass and copper faces that develop a natural patina over time, creating a living finish that evolves with the building

Standoff distance — the gap between the letter back and the wall — is critical for halo quality. We typically recommend 1" to 1.5" standoff for optimal light spread. Light-colored walls amplify the halo effect; dark walls create a more subtle glow. Our engineering team calculates LED placement and standoff distance for each project to achieve the desired visual result. Standard lead time is 3 weeks from approved artwork.

faqs.question: What is the difference between reverse and halo lit channel letters?
faqs.answer: They refer to the same illumination concept — light directed backward to create a glow behind the letter. 'Reverse channel letters' describes the construction (reversed orientation), while 'halo lit' describes the visual effect. At Sunlite Signs, both terms refer to the same product.

faqs.question: What wall colors work best with reverse channel letters?
faqs.answer: Light-colored walls (white, cream, light gray) reflect the most light and produce the brightest, most visible halo effect. Dark walls absorb light and create a subtler, more intimate glow. We adjust LED output based on expected wall color to optimize the effect.

faqs.question: Can reverse channel letters be installed on a raceway?
faqs.answer: Yes, but the raceway must be painted to match the wall color for the halo effect to read properly. Alternatively, we can mount letters on a painted backer panel with integrated standoffs. Flush mounting with individual studs produces the cleanest halo appearance.

title: Open Face Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale open face channel letters with exposed LED or neon illumination. Retro and modern designs, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Built for sign professionals.
heroSubtitle: Exposed illumination sources visible through open letter faces create a bold, eye-catching aesthetic. Available with LED modules or simulated neon for vintage-inspired designs.

sections.heading: Bold Visibility with Exposed Illumination
sections.content:
Open face channel letters eliminate the acrylic face panel, leaving the illumination source — LED modules or neon tubing — directly visible to the viewer. This creates a distinctively bold, high-impact appearance that stands out from standard face-lit signage. The visible light source adds depth, texture, and visual interest that enclosed faces cannot replicate.

Two primary illumination approaches serve different design intents. LED module open face letters use exposed high-output modules visible within the aluminum housing, creating a modern, high-tech appearance with excellent brightness and energy efficiency. Simulated neon open face letters use flexible LED neon tubing that mimics the warm glow and organic curves of traditional glass neon, delivering a vintage or retro aesthetic without the fragility and maintenance challenges of glass neon.

Sunlite Signs fabricates open face channel letters with the same German-engineered precision and UL 48 listed assembly standards as our enclosed letter products. Aluminum returns, paint finishes, and mounting methods are identical. The distinction is purely in the face treatment, giving your clients a unique look backed by the same manufacturing quality your shop relies on.

sections.heading: Applications & Design Considerations
sections.content:
Open face channel letters are particularly effective for specific business types and design goals:

  • Restaurants & Bars: The exposed illumination creates an inviting, energetic atmosphere. Simulated neon options deliver vintage character that resonates with hospitality brands
  • Entertainment Venues: Movie theaters, bowling alleys, and event spaces use open face letters for their high-visibility, retro-modern appeal
  • Retail Storefronts: Boutiques and specialty retailers use open face letters to differentiate from standard face-lit neighbors in multi-tenant shopping centers
  • Industrial & Modern Brands: Tech companies, breweries, and co-working spaces favor the raw, honest aesthetic of exposed LED modules

Design considerations for open face letters include environmental exposure (exposed modules must be IP65 rated for outdoor use), cleaning requirements (open housings collect debris over time), and local sign code compliance (some jurisdictions restrict exposed illumination). Our complimentary engineering team reviews each project for code compliance and provides specifications for optimal performance. Standard production is 3 weeks from approved artwork.

faqs.question: Are open face channel letters suitable for outdoor use?
faqs.answer: Yes, when specified with IP65-rated LED modules or outdoor-rated LED neon tubing. All wiring connections are sealed, and the aluminum housing protects internal components. We specify outdoor-rated components as standard on all exterior applications.

faqs.question: Do open face letters require more maintenance than enclosed letters?
faqs.answer: Open face letters can accumulate dust, insects, and debris inside the housing since there is no acrylic face to seal them. We recommend annual cleaning for outdoor installations. The LED modules themselves require no more maintenance than enclosed configurations.

faqs.question: Can you replicate the look of vintage neon with LED?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our flexible LED neon tubing closely replicates the warm glow, smooth curves, and visual character of traditional glass neon. It is available in multiple colors and color temperatures, is shatterproof, and uses a fraction of the energy of glass neon.

title: Raceway Mounted Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale raceway mounted channel letters pre-wired for fast installation. German-engineered, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Sign trade wholesale pricing.
heroSubtitle: Pre-wired to an aluminum raceway for streamlined installation. The most popular mounting method for multi-tenant shopping centers, strip malls, and commercial fascia applications.

sections.heading: Streamlined Installation with Pre-Wired Raceways
sections.content:
Raceway mounting is the industry's most efficient channel letter installation method. Letters are pre-wired and mounted to an aluminum raceway box at our facility, creating a single assembly that bolts to the building fascia with minimal field wiring. This approach reduces installation time by 30-50% compared to individually flush-mounted letters, lowering your crew's labor costs and time on ladders.

Sunlite Signs fabricates raceways from 0.063" aluminum sheet, formed and welded to match the letter set's layout. Standard raceway depths are 3" and 4", with custom depths available for specific clearance requirements. Raceways are painted to match the building fascia color — specify the color at order time and we will match any PMS, RAL, or custom color specification.

Every raceway assembly ships fully wired with UL recognized power supplies, quick-connect fittings for primary power connection, and complete wiring diagrams. Your installation crew makes a single primary power connection, bolts the raceway to the wall, and the job is done. Our German-engineered assembly process ensures clean wire routing, secure module connections, and UL 48 listed compliance for the complete assembly.

sections.heading: Raceway Specifications & Customization
sections.content:
Every raceway is custom-fabricated to match the specific letter set layout. Standard specifications include:

  • Material: 0.063" aluminum sheet, welded construction with smooth, finished edges
  • Dimensions: Custom length and height to fit the letter layout. Standard depth of 3" or 4". Heights typically 6" to 12" depending on letter size
  • Finish: Automotive-grade polyurethane paint in any color. Most commonly painted to match the building fascia for a discreet appearance
  • Mounting: Pre-drilled mounting holes with specified bolt pattern. We provide fastener recommendations based on your wall type (concrete, steel, wood frame, EIFS)
  • Electrical: Internal power supply mounting, pre-wired letter connections, and external primary power access point with waterproof connector

For multi-tenant shopping centers with landlord-specified raceway standards, we can fabricate to match existing raceway dimensions and mounting patterns. Our complimentary engineering team reviews landlord criteria documents and ensures compliance. Send us the criteria letter and we handle the rest. Standard lead time is 3 weeks from approved artwork for both letters and raceway.

faqs.question: Can the raceway be painted to match the building?
faqs.answer: Yes. We paint every raceway to your specified color using automotive-grade polyurethane paint. Provide a PMS, RAL, or custom color specification and we will match it. Most customers match the building fascia color so the raceway blends in visually.

faqs.question: How many primary power connections are needed for a raceway?
faqs.answer: Typically one. The raceway ships fully pre-wired internally, so your electrician makes a single primary power connection to the raceway junction box. For very long letter sets requiring multiple power supplies, we may specify two connection points and will detail this on the wiring diagram.

faqs.question: Do you accommodate landlord sign criteria for raceway specifications?
faqs.answer: Yes. Send us the landlord's sign criteria document and we will fabricate the raceway to match their specified dimensions, mounting method, and color requirements. Our engineering team reviews criteria documents at no charge and flags any potential compliance issues.

title: Flush Mount Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale flush mount channel letters for a clean, floating appearance. Stud-mounted directly to walls, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Sign trade wholesale only.
heroSubtitle: Individual letters mounted directly to the building surface with concealed studs for a clean, floating appearance. No raceway visible — just letters on the wall.

sections.heading: Clean Aesthetics with Direct Wall Mounting
sections.content:
Flush mount channel letters attach individually to the building surface using threaded studs and spacers, eliminating the visible raceway that characterizes most commercial channel letter installations. The result is a clean, architectural appearance where each letter appears to float on the wall surface. This mounting method is strongly preferred by architects, upscale retailers, and building owners who prioritize visual refinement.

Sunlite Signs fabricates flush mount letters with threaded aluminum studs welded to the letter back. Each stud aligns with a drilled hole in the building fascia, and the letter is secured with nuts from behind the wall (when accessible) or with toggle-type fasteners in hollow walls. A full-scale paper template ships with every order, showing exact stud locations for precise hole drilling.

Electrical connections for flush mount installations run behind the wall surface or through a concealed wireway. We provide detailed wiring diagrams showing recommended wire routing, junction box placement, and power supply location. All assemblies are UL 48 listed and manufactured with our standard German-engineered fabrication process.

sections.heading: Installation Requirements & Considerations
sections.content:
Flush mount installations require more planning than raceway-mounted alternatives. Key considerations include:

  • Wall Access: Ideal installations have access behind the wall for fastening nuts and routing wires. If rear access is unavailable, toggle bolts or expanding anchors can be used, though this increases installation time
  • Wire Routing: Low-voltage wires must be routed from each letter to a central power supply location. This typically requires core drilling or conduit runs behind the fascia. Plan wire paths before letter placement
  • Wall Material: Flush mounting works on most surfaces — concrete, CMU, steel stud with substrate, wood frame, and ACM panels. We specify appropriate fasteners for each wall type
  • Power Supply Location: Remote power supplies are typically mounted inside the building or in an accessible location above the ceiling. We specify maximum wire run distances based on letter count and total power draw

Despite the additional installation complexity, flush mount letters command a premium price point from end users due to their superior aesthetics. Many sign shops find that the higher selling price more than offsets the increased installation labor. Our complimentary engineering support includes installation planning assistance and wire routing recommendations. Standard production is 3 weeks from approved artwork.

faqs.question: Are flush mount letters more expensive than raceway-mounted?
faqs.answer: The letters themselves are priced similarly. The cost difference is in installation — flush mounting requires more field labor for wire routing and individual letter fastening. However, the premium aesthetic typically allows sign shops to charge higher prices to end users, improving overall project margins.

faqs.question: Can flush mount letters be used on all wall types?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide fastener specifications for concrete, CMU, steel stud with substrate, wood frame, EIFS, and ACM panel walls. Some wall types require backer plates or reinforcement. Our engineering team evaluates each wall type and provides specific mounting recommendations.

faqs.question: How are the electrical connections made for flush mount letters?
faqs.answer: Low-voltage wires from each letter route behind the wall to a central power supply. We provide quick-connect fittings for letter-to-wire connections and specify wire gauge, maximum run distances, and junction box requirements. Primary power to the power supply must be installed by a licensed electrician.

title: Custom Channel Letter Signs | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale custom channel letter signs fabricated to your exact specifications. Any font, color, size, or illumination style. UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery.
heroSubtitle: Every channel letter set we produce is custom-fabricated to your specifications. No stock sizes, no standard configurations — just precision manufacturing tailored to each project.

sections.heading: Fully Custom Fabrication for Every Project
sections.content:
At Sunlite Signs, there is no such thing as an off-the-shelf channel letter. Every letter set is custom-fabricated from scratch based on your approved artwork, specifications, and project requirements. This means unlimited flexibility in font selection, letter sizing, color matching, illumination type, and mounting configuration.

Our German-engineered manufacturing process handles the full range of custom requirements with consistent quality. Whether your project calls for 6-inch letters for an interior wayfinding sign or 60-inch letters for a highway-visible monument, the same CNC fabrication equipment, welding standards, and quality checkpoints apply. Complex logos, unusual fonts, dimensional graphics, and mixed-media designs are all within our capabilities.

Custom does not mean slow. Our standard production timeline is 3 weeks from approved artwork for both simple text sets and complex custom configurations. We achieve this consistency through efficient workflow design, well-maintained equipment, and experienced fabrication teams who handle diverse projects daily. Rush production is available when your project timeline demands it.

sections.heading: The Custom Order Process
sections.content:
Ordering custom channel letters from Sunlite Signs follows a structured process designed to ensure accuracy and eliminate surprises:

  • Quote Request: Submit your artwork (vector preferred), specifications, and project details. We return a detailed quote within 24 hours on standard configurations
  • Engineering Review: Our complimentary engineering team evaluates the design for fabricability, structural integrity, illumination performance, and code compliance. We flag potential issues and recommend solutions before production
  • Shop Drawings: Detailed drawings showing all dimensions, colors, mounting details, and electrical specifications. Production does not begin until you approve these drawings
  • Fabrication: CNC cutting, bending, welding, painting, LED installation, wiring, and quality testing — all performed in our facility under UL 48 listed conditions
  • Quality Inspection: Every letter is illumination-tested and visually inspected before packing. Letters are crated or boxed with protective material for damage-free shipping

Throughout this process, you have a dedicated project contact at Sunlite Signs who manages communication, tracks production progress, and ensures your specifications are followed precisely. We are your manufacturing partner — wholesale only, never competing with your sign shop for end-user business.

faqs.question: Is there a minimum order quantity for custom channel letters?
faqs.answer: No. We fabricate custom channel letters in any quantity — from a single letter to sets with hundreds of characters. Every order receives the same engineering attention, quality standards, and production priority regardless of size.

faqs.question: Can you fabricate channel letters from my client's custom logo font?
faqs.answer: Yes. Send us the vector artwork and we will fabricate letters in any custom font or logo configuration. Our engineering team reviews every custom font for fabricability and will recommend modifications only if structural or illumination concerns arise.

faqs.question: What file formats do you accept for custom artwork?
faqs.answer: We prefer vector formats: AI, EPS, PDF, or SVG. High-resolution raster files (PSD, PNG at 300 DPI or higher) can be used but may require vectorization. We handle file conversion and preparation at no additional charge.

title: 3D Channel Letters | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale 3D channel letters with deep-profile dimensional impact. German-engineered aluminum construction, UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery. Sign trade only.
heroSubtitle: Deep-profile dimensional letters that command attention through physical depth and illuminated presence. The classic format for commercial signage that needs to be noticed.

sections.heading: Maximum Visual Impact Through Dimensional Depth
sections.content:
3D channel letters are the foundational format of commercial illuminated signage. Their three-dimensional aluminum construction creates physical depth that flat signage cannot match — letters that project from the building surface, cast shadows during the day, and glow with internal illumination at night. This combination of dimensional presence and illumination makes channel letters the most effective format for storefront identification and brand visibility.

At Sunlite Signs, we fabricate 3D channel letters with return depths ranging from 3 inches to 8 inches, depending on letter size, design intent, and illumination requirements. Deeper returns create more dramatic shadow lines and a stronger three-dimensional presence, while shallower returns offer a sleeker profile for modern architectural contexts. Our German-engineered CNC benders produce consistent, smooth returns regardless of depth specification.

Every 3D channel letter we manufacture features welded aluminum construction, internally mounted LED modules, and UL 48 listed assembly. Whether your project calls for front lit, halo lit, combination lit, or open face illumination, the three-dimensional housing is the same precision-fabricated structure that has made channel letters the sign industry's most trusted format.

sections.heading: Applications & Configuration Options
sections.content:
3D channel letters serve virtually every commercial signage application. Common configurations include:

  • Storefront Identification: The primary use case. Single-tenant and multi-tenant retail locations use 3D channel letters as their primary identification signage. Standard heights range from 14" to 36"
  • Monument Signs: 3D channel letters mounted on monument structures for properties set back from the road. Internally illuminated cabinet-style or pin-mounted to masonry bases
  • Building Identification: Large-format 3D letters (36" to 72"+) for corporate campuses, hospitals, universities, and government buildings where long-distance readability is essential
  • Interior Wayfinding: Smaller 3D channel letters (6" to 12") for lobby signage, department identification, and interior branding in commercial spaces

Available illumination styles include front lit, halo lit (reverse lit), combination lit (front + halo), and open face. Face materials range from translucent acrylic in 40+ colors to opaque metals including painted aluminum, brushed stainless, and patina metals. Our complimentary engineering service helps you select the optimal configuration for each project. Production timeline is 3 weeks from approved artwork.

faqs.question: What is the maximum size for 3D channel letters?
faqs.answer: We regularly fabricate letters up to 72" tall and can produce larger sizes for special projects. Very large letters may be fabricated in sections and assembled in the field. Our engineering team evaluates structural requirements for oversized letters and provides wind load calculations where needed.

faqs.question: What return depths are available for 3D channel letters?
faqs.answer: Standard return depths range from 3" to 8". We recommend minimum 3.5" depth for most illuminated applications to ensure proper LED module fit and even light distribution. Deeper returns create a more pronounced 3D effect and stronger shadow lines.

faqs.question: Can 3D channel letters be used for interior applications?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Interior 3D channel letters are available in smaller sizes (6"+), with lower-output LED modules appropriate for indoor viewing distances. We can also fabricate non-illuminated 3D letters for interior applications where electrical connections are impractical.

title: Channel Letters with Logo | Wholesale | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letters with custom logo fabrication. Illuminated logos and text sets, German-engineered, UL 48 listed. 3-week delivery for sign professionals.
heroSubtitle: Combine illuminated channel letter text with a custom-fabricated logo element for complete brand representation. We manufacture both components as an integrated sign set.

sections.heading: Integrated Text & Logo Sign Sets
sections.content:
Most commercial signage projects require more than text alone — they need a complete brand presentation that includes the business name in channel letters alongside an illuminated or dimensional logo mark. Sunlite Signs fabricates both components as an integrated set, ensuring consistent construction quality, color matching, and mounting alignment between text and logo elements.

Logo elements can be fabricated using several approaches depending on the design complexity. Simple geometric logos are fabricated as oversized channel letters using the same aluminum return and LED illumination process. Complex logos with fine details, overlapping elements, or full-color graphics may use push-through acrylic on an aluminum backer, creating a backlit effect that renders the logo in full color. For the most detailed reproductions, digital-print vinyl on illuminated acrylic panels provides photographic-quality color reproduction.

Our German-engineered fabrication process handles the transition between text and logo seamlessly. Both components mount to the same raceway or share a common mounting template for flush installations. Wiring is integrated so the entire sign set operates from a single power supply connection. Every assembly is UL 48 listed as a complete unit.

sections.heading: Logo Fabrication Methods & Options
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs offers multiple logo fabrication methods to match every design requirement and budget level:

  • Channel Letter Logo: The logo is fabricated as dimensional channel letters using the same process as text characters. Best for simple, bold logo shapes with clean edges. Illumination matches the text set
  • Push-Through Acrylic Logo: Colored acrylic shapes are pushed through a routed aluminum face panel. Creates a multi-color illuminated logo with a flat, clean face. Excellent for logos with multiple distinct color regions
  • Cabinet-Style Logo: A shallow aluminum cabinet with a translucent acrylic face. Digital-print graphics on the face reproduce the logo in full color. Best for complex, multi-color logos with gradients or photographic elements
  • Flat-Cut Logo: Non-illuminated dimensional aluminum or acrylic logo mounted alongside illuminated channel letter text. A cost-effective option when the logo does not require its own illumination

We provide detailed mockups showing how the logo and text elements will integrate on the building fascia. Our complimentary engineering team evaluates each logo design and recommends the fabrication method that best balances visual fidelity, durability, and cost. Standard production for integrated text-and-logo sets is 3 weeks from approved artwork.

faqs.question: Can you match my client's exact logo colors in an illuminated format?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer PMS color matching for acrylic faces, push-through elements, and digital-print panels. For complex logos with many colors, digital-print translucent vinyl on white acrylic provides the most accurate reproduction. We provide proofs for approval before production.

faqs.question: Are the logo and text elements wired together?
faqs.answer: Yes. We wire the complete sign set — text and logo elements — to operate from a single power supply connection. For raceway-mounted installations, both components mount to the same raceway. For flush mount, we provide an integrated template showing all mounting points.

faqs.question: What if the logo is too detailed for channel letter fabrication?
faqs.answer: We evaluate every logo and recommend the best fabrication method. Logos with fine details, thin lines, or complex overlapping elements are better suited to push-through acrylic or cabinet-style fabrication. We will present options with pricing so you can make the best choice for your project.

title: Wholesale Channel Letter Pricing | Sunlite Signs
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter pricing for sign trade professionals. Transparent quotes, volume discounts, 3-week delivery. German-engineered, UL 48 listed. Trade only.
heroSubtitle: Transparent, competitive wholesale pricing exclusively for sign trade professionals. No hidden fees, no retail markup — just manufacturer-direct pricing that protects your margins.

sections.heading: Transparent Pricing for Sign Professionals
sections.content:
Sunlite Signs operates on a wholesale-only model — we sell exclusively to sign shops, sign companies, and trade professionals. We never sell directly to end users, which means we never compete with your business for retail customers. This commitment to the trade channel allows us to offer consistent, transparent pricing that you can build reliable margins on project after project.

Our channel letter pricing is based on straightforward factors: letter height, return depth, illumination type, face material, finish specifications, and quantity. We do not use opaque pricing matrices or require minimum order quantities. A single-letter order receives the same per-unit attention and quality standards as a 500-letter national rollout. Every quote includes detailed line-item pricing so you can see exactly what drives the total cost.

Volume pricing is available for sign shops with recurring needs or multi-location rollout projects. Our volume tiers are designed to reward consistent partnership without requiring unrealistic commitments. Contact our sales team for volume pricing schedules tailored to your typical project mix.

sections.heading: What Is Included in Every Quote
sections.content:
Every Sunlite Signs channel letter quote includes a comprehensive scope of work with no hidden charges:

  • Custom Fabrication: CNC-cut aluminum backs and returns, formed and welded to your specifications
  • LED Illumination: High-output LED modules with 5-year warranty, installed and wired
  • Paint & Finish: Automotive-grade polyurethane paint in your specified color. Standard colors included; PMS matching available
  • UL 48 Listing: Complete UL compliance documentation, labels, and wiring diagrams
  • Mounting Hardware: Studs, spacers, templates, and fastener specifications for your wall type
  • Complimentary Engineering: Design review, structural analysis, and installation support at no additional charge
  • Quality Testing: Full illumination testing and multi-point quality inspection before shipping

Shipping is quoted separately based on destination and package dimensions. We ship nationwide via common carrier with protective crating for damage-free delivery. Standard production is 3 weeks from approved artwork. Rush service is available at a published premium. Request a quote today and receive a response within 24 hours.

faqs.question: Do you require a minimum order to receive wholesale pricing?
faqs.answer: No. We do not have minimum order requirements. A single-letter order receives the same wholesale pricing structure as large orders. Volume discounts are available for sign shops with recurring needs or multi-location projects.

faqs.question: How quickly can I get a quote?
faqs.answer: We return quotes within 24 hours on standard channel letter configurations. Complex custom projects may require an additional day for engineering review. Submit your artwork and specifications through our quote request form or email them directly to your sales contact.

faqs.question: Do you offer terms or credit accounts?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer Net 30 terms for qualified sign shops after a brief credit application process. New customers typically start with prepayment or credit card and can apply for terms after their first order.

title: Channel Letter Repair & Replacement | Wholesale | Sunlite
metaDescription: Wholesale channel letter repair and replacement services. Match existing letters, LED retrofits, and full replacements. UL 48 listed, 3-week delivery for sign shops.
heroSubtitle: Match existing letter sets, replace damaged units, and retrofit outdated illumination with modern LED technology. Fast turnaround to keep your service customers satisfied.

sections.heading: Matching & Replacing Existing Channel Letters
sections.content:
Service and maintenance work is a significant revenue stream for sign shops, and replacement channel letters are a core part of that business. Sunlite Signs manufactures replacement letters engineered to match existing installations — matching font, size, color, return depth, and illumination type so the new letter integrates seamlessly with the remaining set.

Our matching process begins with your measurements and photographs of the existing letters. We analyze the font, measure the dimensions, identify the acrylic color and paint finish, and fabricate a replacement that is visually indistinguishable from the originals. For older installations where the original acrylic color may have shifted due to UV exposure, we can adjust the new letter's face color to match the current appearance rather than the original specification.

Full set replacements are also common — updating an entire letter set due to rebranding, tenant changeover, or end-of-life deterioration. New letter sets mount to existing raceways when feasible, saving your client the cost of new mounting infrastructure. Our German-engineered fabrication and UL 48 listing ensure that replacement letters meet current code requirements even when matching older designs.

sections.heading: LED Retrofit & Modernization
sections.content:
Many existing channel letter installations still use fluorescent or first-generation LED illumination that is failing, inefficient, or no longer supported by component manufacturers. Sunlite Signs offers wholesale LED retrofit solutions:

  • Drop-In LED Retrofit Kits: Pre-wired LED module strips sized to fit existing letter housings. Your crew removes the old illumination, drops in the new LED modules, and connects to the existing or new power supply. Available for standard letter sizes with fast turnaround
  • Complete Letter Replacement: When existing housings are too deteriorated for retrofit, we fabricate new letters matched to the original specifications with modern LED illumination. New letters mount to existing raceways or mounting points
  • Power Supply Upgrades: New UL recognized LED power supplies sized for the retrofit module configuration. We specify the correct power supply for each project based on module count and wire run distances
  • Partial Set Replacement: Replace only the failed or deteriorated letters while the remaining original letters continue in service. We match the new letters to the existing set for visual consistency

LED retrofits deliver immediate benefits for your service customers — lower energy consumption, reduced maintenance frequency, and improved brightness uniformity. Our complimentary engineering team can evaluate your retrofit project and recommend the most cost-effective approach. Standard production is 3 weeks, with rush service available for urgent repairs.

faqs.question: Can you match replacement letters to an existing set from another manufacturer?
faqs.answer: Yes. Send us detailed photos and measurements of the existing letters and we will fabricate replacements that match the font, size, color, depth, and illumination style. We routinely match letters from all major manufacturers.

faqs.question: How long does it take to get replacement letters?
faqs.answer: Standard production for replacement letters is 3 weeks from approved specifications. Rush service is available for critical repairs. Simple single-letter replacements may qualify for expedited 2-week production depending on current shop workload.

faqs.question: Do LED retrofits require new UL listing?
faqs.answer: Field-installed LED retrofit kits fall under UL 879 classification requirements rather than UL 48. We can provide UL recognized retrofit components, but the field installation is subject to local electrical code compliance. Our engineering team can advise on the compliance requirements for your specific retrofit project.
